title: Power Window / Sunroof One-Touch Calibration Reset
description: After battery disconnect, window motor replacement, or regulator replacement, the window control module loses its learned travel limits and disables one-touch open/close and anti-pinch protection. Recalibration restores full functionality and critical safety features.
common_symptoms: window stops partway and reverses with no obstruction
one-touch up/down not working after battery disconnect
sunroof not fully opening or closing
window motor replaced but auto function inoperative
physical_solution: Physical calibration procedure (preferred, works on most vehicles without scan tool): Turn ignition ON. Lower window fully by holding switch DOWN until window fully open — hold extra 2-3 seconds after bottom travel limit. Then raise window fully by holding switch UP until window fully closed — hold extra 2-3 seconds after top travel limit. Release switch. Test one-touch function. For sunroof: TILT UP fully and hold 3 seconds, then SLIDE OPEN fully and hold 3 seconds, then SLIDE CLOSE fully and hold 3 seconds, then TILT DOWN fully and hold 3 seconds.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Partial — Physical hold-switch method works on most vehicles without any scan tool. UDS $31 calibration routine accessible on older platforms without gateway. BMW FRM (0x62) requires ISTA for full calibration on F/G-series. VW door control units (0x42/0x43/0x44/0x45) accessible via $31 on pre-SFD vehicles (pre-2019).
preconditions: window motor and regulator properly installed
no mechanical obstruction in window track or seals

procedure_steps.description: Check battery voltage — must be above 12.4V. Low voltage causes calibration to fail or learn incorrect travel limits, resulting in window stopping short or anti-pinch misfires.

Physical method (attempt first — resolves 80% of cases without scan tool): with ignition ON, hold window switch DOWN until window reaches full open position. Continue holding switch DOWN for 3 seconds past the mechanical stop. Release.

Then hold window switch UP until window reaches full closed position. Continue holding switch UP for 3 seconds past the mechanical stop. Release. Test one-touch by briefly pressing switch — window should traverse full travel and stop.

If physical method fails, enter door module extended session. Window module addresses: VW/Audi front-left 0x42, front-right 0x43, rear-left 0x44, rear-right 0x45. BMW FRM 0x62. Toyota body ECU 0x750. Ford GEM/BCM 0x726. Nissan BCM 0x729. Hyundai BCM 0x7A5. GM BCM 0x40.
$10 03 ExtendedDiagnosticSession at door/body module address. Send $3E 00 TesterPresent every 2 seconds to maintain session during calibration.

$31 01 [window calibration routine ID per OEM] — initiates electronic calibration sequence. Module drives motor to both travel limits and records encoder positions. Routine typically completes in 10-20 seconds.

Test one-touch function: briefly press switch — window should traverse full travel and stop. Test anti-pinch: apply slight upward resistance against window glass during auto-close — window must reverse within 100ms of obstruction detection.

For sunroof calibration: enter sunroof/panoramic module in extended session ($10 03), execute $31 sunroof calibration routine per OEM, OR perform manual sequence: full tilt-up and hold 3 sec, full slide-open and hold 3 sec, full slide-close and hold 3 sec, full tilt-down and hold 3 sec.

oem_notes.Toyota/Lexus: Physical hold method works universally on all Toyota and Lexus models — no scan tool required. Power window master switch has built-in initialization logic. For moonroof/sunroof: press CLOSE until fully closed, then hold CLOSE switch 4+ seconds — audible beep confirms successful calibration. Lexus RX/LS $31 path available via body ECU at 0x750 for scan-tool path.
oem_notes.Honda/Acura: Physical hold method works on all standard models. Driver door module accessible at 0x18 area sub-address. CR-V and Pilot sunroof: close fully, hold CLOSE switch 2 seconds, open fully, hold OPEN 2 seconds — sequence completes calibration. Pre-2018 ELM327 accessible for $31 routine.
oem_notes.Nissan/Infiniti: Physical initialization: ignition ON, hold window DOWN switch 2 seconds after reaching full open, then hold UP switch 2 seconds after reaching full close. Nissan Infiniti sunroof: close fully, hold close button 3 seconds. Body Control Module (BCM) at 0x729 for scan-tool path.
oem_notes.Ford: Physical method works on most Ford/Lincoln models. Some Explorer and Edge variants require IDS or FDRS for door module calibration routine. Mustang fastback sunroof requires FDRS on 2018+ (SGW-blocked). Pre-2018 ELM $31 accessible at approximately 0x757 (address varies by model).
oem_notes.GM: Physical hold method works universally on all GM models — no scan tool required. Cadillac CT6 and Escalade panoramic sunroof may require GDS2 $31 routine on some model years. BCM at 0x40 for scan-tool path; window modules integrated into BCM on most GM platforms.
oem_notes.BMW: FRM (Footwell Module) at 0x62 controls all power windows and sunroof. Physical method: hold window switch fully DOWN past travel limit, hold 5 seconds, then hold fully UP past top limit, hold 5 seconds — releases. On F/G-series, FRM initialization for a newly replaced FRM module requires ISTA — ELM327 can read DTCs but write/calibration operations are blocked by ZGW on these platforms. Sunroof controlled by SHD module at approximately 0x60.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: Door control units: J386 (FL) at 0x42, J387 (FR) at 0x43, J388 (RL) at 0x44, J389 (RR) at 0x45. Sunroof/panoramic roof at J245 module 0x76. Physical method: hold DOWN full-open 4 seconds, then hold UP full-close 4 seconds. $31 01 routine ID 0x0038 accessible via ELM327 on pre-2019 vehicles. SFD security on 2019+ requires ODIS for module write operations.
oem_notes.Stellantis: Physical hold method works on all Ram/Jeep/Chrysler models — hold switch 3 seconds past mechanical travel limit in each direction. Chrysler Pacifica sliding door window modules require wiTECH $31 calibration routine on 2018+ (SGW-blocked). Body domain controller integrated on WL-platform (2022+ Grand Cherokee) — wiTECH required.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: Physical method: hold DOWN switch 2 seconds past full-open position, then hold UP switch 2 seconds past full-close position. Genesis GV80 and GV70 SCCM sunroof module may require GDS-Mobile $31 calibration routine. BCM located at approximately 0x7A5. Pre-2019 ELM327 fully accessible for door module $31. Power folding mirror calibration is separate — performed via cluster menu or GDS-Mobile.
